bullets: Managed the engineering team in a Scrum environment, owning sprint planning, backlog prioritization, and delivery accountability for a cloud-based SaaS platform.
Led architecture and code review across a Vue.js front-end, PHP/Laravel back-end, and AWS infrastructure.
Reduced AWS costs by over $6,000/month and migrated environments to Docker, improving deployment consistency.
Drove product direction cross-functionally with design, operations, and clients. Gathered feedback directly from end users.
Managed vendor relationships and consulting engagements through platform end-of-life after acquisition.
Shipped 11+ web applications end-to-end, spanning Vue.js front-ends, Node.js and PHP back-end APIs, database design, and CI/CD pipelines.
Replaced legacy institutional systems with modern web applications, automating manual workflows across departments.
Built system integrations including cron-based data synchronization from network-restricted Oracle databases.
Ran cross-functional requirement-gathering across HR, academic departments, and faculty, translating business needs into technical solutions.
Mentored developers and collaborated across teams to deliver reliable, maintainable software.

projects.name: Hippo Manager 2.0
projects.tech: Vue.js, Laravel, GraphQL, MySQL, Amazon Web Services (AWS), Docker, Tailwind CSS
projects.description: Cloud-based SaaS platform for veterinary clinics covering billing, scheduling, client management, reporting, and treatments.

projects.name: Course Schedule
projects.tech: Vue.js, .NET, PostgreSQL, Oracle Database, Firebase, Docker, Tailwind CSS
projects.description: Displays and filters for-credit courses, syncing data hourly from a legacy Oracle schema involving seven-table joins.
